what_it_does: This file is a channel-attachment metadata record that declares an attachment of type board_items and points it at a specific board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
standouts: It functions purely as a typed pointer from an attachment ID to a board item.
The target uses a board:// URI scheme.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Attachment IDs use the att- prefix.
Targets use a board://item-<uuid> URI format.
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub that links att-5a554f21 to board item item-bbc7b3b0 in dragnet-development.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment actually hold?
What does board item item-bbc7b3b0 represent?
Why is there no title, description, or payload body?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to serve as a typed reference to a board item, and its content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to record that a particular attachment is associated with a specific board item so the channel memory system can resolve or display the link.
contribution: Provides a stable, typed attachment identifier and a direct target reference that a fused system can use to correlate channel attachments with board items.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-only channel attachment record of type board_items that links attachment att-5a554f21 to board item item-bbc7b3b0 in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record a reference between a channel attachment and a specific board item for lookup and context association.
